title: Clarity PvP Pack + FPS Boost
description: A clean PvP texture pack that removes distractions and gives you maximum visibility in every fight.
body: ## ⚔️ Clarity PvP See everything. Miss nothing. **Clarity PvP** is a performance-focused texture pack designed to give competitive players the ultimate visibility advantage. By removing unnecessary visual clutter and enhancing clarity, this pack helps you react faster, track enemies better, and stay in control during every fight. --- ### 🔥 Features - ✨ **Transparent Particles** Fight without distractions — keep your view clear even in chaotic battles. - 🎃 **Transparent Pumpkin Overlay** Wear pumpkins without losing visibility. - 🔥 **Transparent Fire** Flames no longer block your screen during intense combat. - 🧪 **Transparent Potion Effects** Easily track buffs and debuffs without visual clutter. - 💡 **Fullbright** Maximum brightness at all times — no more dark spots or hidden enemies. --- ## 📩 Contact Us: --- ⚔️ Teams • 💰 Economy • 🎁 Custom Ranks - 🎮 **IP:** play.ownverse.fun - 🔌 **Port**: 19132 - 💬 **Discord:** [𝗢𝘄𝗻_𝗩𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗲™ 𝗦𝗠𝗣](https://discord.gg/WS6nnzeeKF) > ❤️ Sponsored by [Server.pro](https://server.pro/) ## Join now and start your adventure! --- ## [Server.pro](https://server.pro/) 🔥 Want smooth Minecraft hosting with no lag? Server.pro gives you powerful performance, stable uptime, and an easy control panel for your server. ⚡ No Lag Experience 🛠 Easy Setup 🌍 24/7 Reliable Hosting 🎮 Java & Bedrock Supported ![Server.pro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d7c07df280ebd67ff3489d78eb410a9e35da41a.jpeg) ## LINKS - **🌐 Website:** [Click here ](https://server.pro/) - **💬 DISCORD Server:** [Click here ](https://discord.gg/server-pro-702862845670457385) Start your journey with Server.pro today. --- ### ❤️ Created by OWN_STUDIO Designed for players who want clean visuals and competitive performance.
